title: CellaKay - The Tech World
body:
A package created from players and for players!

+---------------------------------------------+

Packet includes technical and adventure aspects.
Included among other modifications are:
    - "Applied Energistics"
    - "Create" with additions
    - Custom modification "CellaKay" adding more novelties
    - "ComputerCraft" with additions

+---------------------------------------------+

Immerse yourself in the world of ComputerCraft with the tasks! Open world, lots of friendships with machines. This is just CellaKay!

+---------------------------------------------+

Package version: Alpha
Creator: KayTech
Creator links:
    - https://kaytech.org/
    - https://dsc.gg/kaytech
